subject: session date
fact: The session notes are dated January 19th, 2026.

subject: time limit for contract
fact: Maram il Vass provided an hourglass representing the exact time remaining to secure the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: Maram has provided an hourglass representing the exact time remaining to secure the book before your window of opportunity closes

subject: Felkur's evasion duration
fact: Felkur accidentally evaded the most powerful mages in Mulmaster for many years.
source_quote: allowed him to accidentally evade the most powerful mages in Mulmaster for many years

subject: Brotherhood divination cost
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks has spent thousands of gold pieces on divination rituals.
source_quote: The Brotherhood of Cloaks has spent thousands of gold pieces on divination rituals

subject: High Inquisitors executed
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks executed three High Inquisitors for failing to find Felkur.
source_quote: They've executed three High Inquisitors for 'failing' to find a master infiltrator

subject: Felkur's assumed level
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks calculates that the master infiltrator must be a Level 20 Wizard.

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch sale price
fact: Felkur sold the Watcher's Eye Brooch for forty pieces of silver.
source_quote: bauble you sold for forty pieces of silver

subject: Sporedome stay duration
fact: The party spends two days in Sporedome.
source_quote: The party spends two days in Sporedome

subject: first day in Sporedome
fact: After the first day in Sporedome, the party interrupts Solom Ned'razak.

subject: Sporedome fungal stalk height
fact: Some fungal stalks in Sporedome reach heights of 20 feet and beyond.
source_quote: some stalks reaching heights of 20 feet and beyond

subject: Sporedome camp distance
fact: The drow tents in Sporedome are located several hundred feet to the east of the fungal forest.
source_quote: Several hundred feet to the east, tents have been erected

subject: drow count in Sporedome camp
fact: Several dozen drow elves mill around the tents in Sporedome.
source_quote: around which mill several dozen drow elves

subject: tunnel distance from Maerimydra
fact: The Pathway of Shadows tunnel exits into the Underdark four miles from Maerimydra.
source_quote: The tunnel exited into the Underdark four miles from Maerimydra

subject: Shattered Tower demolition time
fact: The Shattered Tower was demolished over a century ago by Kurgoth Hellspawn and the fire giants.
source_quote: when they took the city over a century ago

subject: Solom's risk assessment
fact: Solom notes he didn't become powerful by taking the wrong kind of risks.
source_quote: he didn't become this powerful by taking the wrong kind of risks
